ikigai over WebTransport — this page does not host the kernel. It opens a WebTransport (HTTP/3 / QUIC) connection to a kernel server; the page pull and every terminal command below are ikigai-wire Calls on their own streams (the same protocol ikigai-ipc/ikigai-quic speak). The kernel — and its cache — are on the other end.

Run cargo run --bin ikigai-net-server, paste the printed cert hash, and connect (or open with #cert=<hash>):
